productKnowledge.description: Learn about the craftsmanship, materials, and techniques that make our scissors exceptional. Discover how to choose the right tool for your needs and maintain it for lasting performance.

page.title: Product Knowledge
page.description: Learn about our products, their care, and how to choose the right tools for your needs.

chooseScissors.title: How to choose the right scissors?
chooseScissors.answer: Consider your cutting technique, hand size, and the type of work you do most often. Our C440 series offers versatile options for general cutting, while specialized thinning and texturizing shears are ideal for specific techniques. The blade length typically ranges from 5.5" to 7", with 6" being the most popular for all-around use.

careMaintenance.title: Proper care and maintenance
careMaintenance.answer: Clean your scissors after each use with a soft cloth. Oil the pivot point regularly with professional shear oil. Store in a protective case when not in use. Have them professionally sharpened annually or when you notice decreased cutting performance. Never use scissors on anything other than hair to maintain blade integrity.

scissorTypes.title: Understanding scissor types
scissorTypes.answer:
Cutting Shears: For general haircutting and creating shapes.
Thinning Shears: One or both blades have teeth for removing bulk.
Texturizing Shears: Wider teeth spacing for softer, more blended results.
Curved Shears: Ideal for detail work and precision cutting.

c440Special.title: What makes our C440 series special?
c440Special.answer: The C440 series represents our flagship professional line. Made from premium Japanese steel with a Rockwell hardness of 58-60, these scissors maintain their edge longer than conventional shears. The ergonomic design reduces hand fatigue during extended use, and the convex edge provides the smoothest cutting action for effortless precision.

razorCare.title: Straight razor care
razorCare.answer: After each use, clean and dry the blade thoroughly. Strop the blade regularly to maintain the edge. For traditional carbon steel razors, apply a thin coat of oil when storing. Professional honing should be done every few months depending on usage. Always store in a dry environment to prevent rust.

warrantySupport.title: Warranty and support
warrantySupport.answer: All Punja products come with our craftsmanship guarantee. Manufacturing defects are covered under warranty. We offer professional sharpening services and repairs for the lifetime of your tools. Contact your authorized dealer for warranty service and maintenance support.

about.title: About Punja
about.intro: Punja represents decades of dedication to the craft of precision tool manufacturing. Our heritage is built on an unwavering commitment to quality, combining traditional craftsmanship with modern innovation.

craftsmanship.title: Our Craftsmanship
craftsmanship.description: Every Punja product is meticulously crafted using premium materials and time-honored techniques. Our master craftsmen bring generations of expertise to each piece, ensuring that every scissor, razor, and tool meets the exacting standards that professionals demand.

heritage.title: Heritage & Innovation
heritage.description: While we honor traditional manufacturing methods, we continuously innovate to meet the evolving needs of modern professionals. Our legendary C440 series exemplifies this balance, combining classic design with cutting-edge precision engineering.

dedication.title: Industry Dedication
dedication.description: Punja tools are trusted by professionals worldwide. From master barbers to skilled craftsmen, our products empower artisans to perform their craft with confidence and precision. We don't just make tools—we create instruments that enable excellence.

about.quote: Quality is not an act, it is a habit. At Punja, excellence is our standard.
